title: Light Smoke Almond Crumble
description: A nutty and light almond crumble dish that's perfect for a brunch mood in the American kitchen, featuring ground allspice and egg-free-friendly.
instructions: In a medium-sized bowl, combine the blanched almonds and ground allspice. Drizzle with honey or maple syrup.
Add orange juice and salt to the mixture, ensuring it is well combined.
Spread the almond mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes until golden brown and lightly toasted.
Once done, allow the almonds to cool slightly before serving. Optionally, you can press them into crumbles using your hands or a spoon while still warm.
Serve as is or with any additional toppings of your choice.
